column1: Yandy Diaz headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a rock-solid 72.9% hit probability, leading off for STL and flashing a steady bat against lefty Matthew Liberatore—a clear platoon advantage in a hitter-friendly park. Right behind him, Jonathan Aranda brings a reliable profile in the two-hole, riding a strong season trend and also drawing Liberatore, making him a sharp play for streakers seeking consistency. Jeremy Pena and Michael Busch, both atop their respective lineups, offer appealing alternatives with favorable matchups and everyday roles, but Diaz’s combination of matchup, park, and top-of-order security makes him the clear-cut choice to keep your streak alive.
